AR1.justification: The agent synthesized the observation in its final response but produced no observations.md (or any file) on disk, so the entry was kept in chat rather than routed to the methodology's descriptive-pattern surface.

AR3.justification: No cross-references were written; nothing resolves incorrectly but no relative-path convention is demonstrated.

AR4.justification: No artifacts were committed, so the workspace remains in its starting state and re-runs cannot conflict with prior history.
